title: Hiring Store Manager at The Coffee Bean India

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at The Coffee Bean India
jsonLd.description:
The Coffee Bean India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Surat. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About The Coffee Bean India:
The Coffee Bean India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with The Coffee Bean India!
